name: CM_LIST_SCROLL_VIEW
description: Scrollable vertical list view managing array of VerticalListItem components. Calculates scroll offset to keep focused item visible. Supports enabled/disabled items, selection highlighting, and keyboard navigation. Item height 68px, viewport 190px.
visualForm: Scrollable container (320x190px) with vertically stacked items (68px each), auto-scroll to keep selection visible
descriptionKo: VerticalListItem 배열을 관리하는 스크롤 가능한 세로 리스트 뷰입니다. 포커스된 항목이 항상 표시되도록 스크롤 오프셋을 자동 계산합니다. 68px 항목, 190px 뷰포트를 사용합니다.
descriptionEn: Scrollable vertical list view managing array of VerticalListItem components. Calculates scroll offset to keep focused item visible. Supports enabled/disabled items, selection highlighting, and keyboard navigation. Item height 68px, viewport 190px.
